changeSet.author: dnd-app
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO enchantment_types (id, name, description, damage_dice, damage_bonus, damage_type, buff_debuff_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'Flaming', 'Огненное зачарование', '1d4', 0, 'FIRE', (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Burning'), now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Frost Touch', 'Ледяное касание', '1d6', 0, 'COLD', NULL, now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Holy', 'Святое зачарование', '1d8', 0, 'RADIANT', (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Blessed'), now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Venomous', 'Ядовитое зачарование', '1d4', 0, 'POISON', (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Poisoned'), now(), now()), (gen_random_uuid(), 'Thunderous', 'Громовое зачарование', '1d6', 0, 'THUNDER', (SELECT id FROM buffs_debuffs WHERE name = 'Stunned'), now(), now());
